calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: AAppearances: Baron L. Miller, for and with Trustee/Petitioner Janet McCarthy
The Court inquired whether the petitioner was aware of any objections to the amended accounting. Mr. Miller responded that he had not seen any. Mr. Miller stated that he had nothing additional to submit regarding the Petition to Approve the Trustee's First Account. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Continued To Aug-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Continued To Jul-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Continued To Jun-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Continued To May-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Baron Miller for and with (trustee) Janet McCarthy. Michael Stephens for (petitioner) Linda Pierik.

Mr. Miller reported that he has tried to file a substitution of attorney but his e-filing was kicked back, he has been retained by the trustee, is trying to update the accounting, will file the initial receipts for distribution, he would like to proceed with the accounting, is working to get original statements and requests a 3 month continuance. Mr. Stephens is in agreement. The accounting petition was continued to May 18, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Continued To Feb-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet McCarthy (trustee) appeared in Propria Persona.

Ms. Mcarthy reported that she has met with attorney Baron Miller, she believes he will be working with her in the future, that Mr. Miller indicated it would take 3 months to review the matter and that she will meet with him tomorrow. The court indicated that it is not inclined to grant the 3 month continuance. The accounting petition was continued to February 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 by which time Mr. Miller is to have substituted in or the court would consider suspension.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Maloney. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2014 Continued To Jan-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet McCarthy (Trustee) in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that Mr. Stephens was not present. Ms. McCarthy stated that she would be able to file the amendment to the petition within one week. The accounting petition was continued to January 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Oct-22-2014 Continued To Dec-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Continued To Oct-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Oct-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Stephens for Linda Pierik. Janet McCarthy in Propria Persona.

Ms. McCarthy stated that she has the accounting ready to be filed, that she was told by the file Clerk that it had to be e-filed and then told by e-file that she had to file it with the Court. Ms. McCarthy also stated that the account is out of balance by about $3,000.00, that there is about $20,000.00 cash on hand and that Estate taxes were filed once. Status on filing of the accounting was continued to October 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Stephens for Linda Pierik (Petitioner). Janet McCarthy (Trustee) in Propria Persona.

Ms. McCarthy stated that she does not have an Attorney, that Mr. Shustoff does not do Court appearances and that she has a draft of the accounting but that it is not totally complete. Ms. McCarthy also requested a 90-day continuance stating that she still needs to file the Estate taxes and do other tasks. Mr. Stephens stated that he prefers 60-days. Status on filing of the accounting was continued to August 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account.
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Stephens for and with Linda Pierik. Janet McCarthy (Trustee) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Stephens stated that Ms. McCarthy is the sole Trustee. The Court granted the Petition to Compel Trustee to Account (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of the accounting was set for June 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
